reasoning: The question asks if the government of Mali announced a reversal of its May 13, 2025 decree dissolving all political parties before July 1, 2025. Search results indicate that the decree remained fully in effect through June and July 2025. On June 17, 2025, the European Parliament passed a resolution urging the Malian president to reverse the decree, indicating no reversal had occurred by then. In late August 2025, a Malian court ruled to stay the execution of the decree, further demonstrating that the government had not voluntarily reversed its decision prior to that ruling, let alone prior to July 1. Therefore, the outcome is clearly No.
